overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a peaceful walk through a rocky canyon. The player character wades through a shallow creek between steep cliff walls before ascending to a dirt trail, with pine trees and distant snow-capped peaks visible in the mountainous wilderness.

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow creek water between rocky canyon walls

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation rising on the left side of the canyon
steep rocky cliff face with scattered pine trees on the right side
shallow clear water flowing over rocks and gravel in the canyon bottom
large moss-covered rocks scattered throughout the stream bed
tall evergreen trees growing along the canyon edges and crevices

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a shallow rocky creek in a narrow mountain canyon. Steep cliff faces rise on both sides while pine trees dot the upper ridges, and clear water flows gently around moss-covered boulders in the stream bed.

events.description: character ascends the right creek bank and transitions from water to dry dirt trail

agents.ego_description: climbing up the right bank of the creek and transitioning onto a dirt path

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding along the elevated bank above the creek
massive boulder outcropping alongside the ascending trail

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the right bank of the creek, leaving the water behind and transitioning onto a dirt trail. The rocky canyon walls continue to flank the path while the creek becomes visible below to the left, and the ground changes from wet stone to dry earth.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated canyon trail with distant mountain views

events.description: distant snow-capped mountain peak becomes visible through the canyon opening ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated dirt trail overlooking the creek below

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peak visible in the distance through the canyon gap

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated dirt trail overlooking the creek below, the canyon opens up ahead to reveal a distant snow-capped mountain peak. The path continues between steep rocky walls and scattered pine trees, with the creek now visible further down to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins in the depths of a narrow canyon and ascends toward an expansive mountain vista. It begins by wading through a shallow rocky creek, where clear water flows around moss-covered boulders beneath towering cliff faces and pine-dotted ridges. As the camera climbs the right bank, the environment transitions from wet stone to dry earth, leaving the stream behind to follow an elevated dirt trail. The scene then opens up as the path winds between steep rocky walls, revealing the creek flowing below to the left. Finally, the canyon walls recede to unveil a distant, snow-capped mountain peak towering over the wilderness.
